character.name: CAT?
desc: The ship's computer? Her cards <c=boldPink>exhaust</c> other cards, and provide lots of <c=boldPink>attacks</c> and <c=boldPink>debuffs</c>

EvilCatFullMemoryAccessStatus.name: Full Kernel Access
EvilCatFullMemoryAccessStatus.desc: For the rest of combat, gain <c=boldPink>{0}</c> <c=status>TEMP SHIELD</c> any time a card is exhausted.

EvilCatMemoryMismatchStatus.name: Buffer Overflow
EvilCatMemoryMismatchStatus.desc: At the start of every turn, add <c=boldPink>{0}</c> SegFault cards to your hand.

EvilCatGenericDrawStatus.name: Persistent Draw
EvilCatGenericDrawStatus.desc: At the start of every turn, draw <c=boldPink>{0}</c>.

EvilCatDeallocateStatus.name: Viral Accelerant
EvilCatDeallocateStatus.desc: For the rest of combat, gain <c=boldPink>{0}</c> <c=status>EVADE</c> any time a card is exhausted.

AExhaustSelect.title: Exhaust Choice
AExhaustSelect.desc_single: Choose <c=boldPink>1</c> card to exhaust from your hand.
AExhaustSelect.desc: Choose <c=boldPink>{{cnt}}</c> cards to discard from your hand.

AOptionalExhaustSelect.title: Optional Exhaust
AOptionalExhaustSelect.desc_single: Optionally exhaust <c=boldPink>1</c> card from your hand.
AOptionalExhaustSelect.desc: Optionally exhaust up to <c=boldPink>{{cnt}}</c> cards from your hand.

EvilCatRestore.name: Restore
EvilCatRestore.desc: Return an <c=cardtrait>exhausted</c> card to the draw pile.
EvilCatRestore.descA: Return 2 <c=cardtrait>exhausted</c> cards to the draw pile.
EvilCatRestore.descB: Return an <c=cardtrait>exhausted</c> card to the discard pile.

EvilCatFork.name: Fork
EvilCatFork.desc: Attack for {{cnt}}. Add a <c=cardtrait>temp</c> <c=card>Fork</c> to your <c=keyword>discard pile</c>.
EvilCatFork.descA: Pierce for {{cnt}}. Add a <c=cardtrait>temp</c> <c=card>Fork A</c> to your <c=keyword>discard pile</c>.
EvilCatFork.descB: Attack for {{cnt}}. Add a <c=cardtrait>temp</c> <c=card>Fork B</c> to your <c=keyword>discard pile</c>.

EvilCatRegistryEdit.name: Rootkit Patch
EvilCatRegistryEdit.desc: Select a card in hand to gain <c=cardtrait>persistent</c> this combat.
EvilCatRegistryEdit.descA: Select a card in hand to gain <c=cardtrait>persistent</c> this combat.
EvilCatRegistryEdit.descB: Select a card in hand to gain <c=cardtrait>persistent</c> this combat.

EvilCatErase.name: Erase
EvilCatErase.desc: Exhaust a card in your draw pile. Draw 1.
EvilCatErase.descA: Exhaust a card in your draw pile. Draw 2.
EvilCatErase.descB: Exhaust a card in your draw pile. Draw 1. Gain 1 <c=energy>energy</c>.

EvilCatThreadMismatch.name: Thread Mismatch
EvilCatThreadMismatch.desc: The first time you exhaust a card in combat, draw 3 cards.

Immortal.name: Persistent
Immortal.desc: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your exhaust pile, it is placed in the discard pile.
